title: AI Convention Lifecycle Corpus — Adoption Is Not Maintenance (v2)
description:
Replication package for the empirical study Adoption Is Not Maintenance: The Adoption–Maintenance Gap in AI Instructional Artifacts on GitHub.

The deposit includes frozen YAML protocols, GitHub URL seed pools, a Python extraction and analysis pipeline, aggregated tabular datasets (Parquet/CSV/JSON), headline gap statistics, and a 40-row manual-validation sample.

Primary cohort (v2): 220 discovered adopted repositories; 209 successfully extracted and analyzed; 13,988 ever-introduced AI instructional artifact instances. Primary maintenance window T = 180 days.

Headline results: artifact-level mature-present gap 56.0%; repository-level gap 7.2%.

Licensing: source code under MIT (LICENSE); aggregated data files under CC-BY 4.0 (see README). Full git repository clones are not included; re-extraction clones public URLs from data/lifecycle/discovered_v2.csv.

Reproduction: see README.md and docs/reproducibility.md. Quick check: make verify-headline.
notes: Replace PLACEHOLDER URLs and ORCID before deposit. Code is MIT-licensed; if Zenodo accepts only one license field, CC-BY-4.0 applies to aggregated data—note MIT code license in description and LICENSE file.
